infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MeetUp uses your location during an active meetup so your friend can see where you are.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MeetUp can keep sharing your location in the background only while an active meetup is in progress.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MeetUp can keep sharing your location in the background only while an active meetup is in progress.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: MeetUp can keep sharing your location in the background only while an active meetup is in progress.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: MeetUp uses your location during an active meetup so your friend can see where you are.

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow MeetUp to access your contacts to find friends.
